turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I have an appointment this evening with your neurologist but I'm not going to be able to make it. Can we move it?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, I understand. May I have your name and registered number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. I can see your 5 PM appointment with Dr. Leena Verma. When would you like to reschedule?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Umm, is next Saturday possible? Preferably morning.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Verma unfortunately doesn't hold clinic on Saturdays. The next available slots are next Monday at 9 AM or Thursday at 4 PM.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Rescheduled for Siddharth Naik, Thursday at 4 PM with Dr. Leena Verma. You'll receive an updated SMS. Is there anything else?
